caption: A man with blond hair and white headphones, wearing a navy blue shirt, is seen in a small picture-in-picture window against a background featuring a Christmas tree and a white wall. He is smiling and speaking into a black microphone. Most of the screen is occupied by a purple-themed interface from a video game, showing a digital player card for "ANDY DALTON," a "QB" with an "84" rating. The card displays a photo of the player wearing a white jersey with the number "14." As the sequence progresses, the man's expression becomes more animated and surprised. In the final frame, the card for Andy Dalton is replaced by a card for "O.J. HOWARD," a "TE" with an "84" rating. Text appears on the screen including "TOTW PRESENT" and a status bar showing "173,037," "14,609," "2,343,543," and "LVL 19."
